author: Bastions
text:
Forward-compat: symmetric unknown=round-trip across serde seams

Generalize the unknown=round-trip rule from Task fields to every serde seam the participant model crosses, and harden the two not yet covered: describe subscription set (unknown event dropped, handshake survives instead of demoting to the legacy shim) and native propose-response variants (unknown variant captured in ProposeResponse.extra, degraded to Other and named).

Lands the epic's SPEC amendment in the prereq child: S13 states the rule once and generally; S5.1 adds the EventCtx wire-delivery contract; S6.1/S6.2/S16 make create first-class and resolve drop as observe-only; S8.1 adds reject vs conflict vs Other; S17.17-S17.21 conformance.

Unit + end-to-end conformance. Full suite green, clippy clean, 100% coverage.
